tagline: Swimming Pool Renovation, Repair & Maintenance in Charlotte NC and Fort Mill SC

hero.headline:
30 Years Keeping Pools Crystal
Clear
hero.subheadline: Charlotte's largest pool service provider has been earning families' trust since 1996. From weekly maintenance to full renovations — we handle it all so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to major renovations, our team of dedicated professionals handles every aspect of pool care so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and filter cleaning on a flexible schedule. No binding contracts — just consistently swim-ready water.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Re-plastering, acid washing, deck staining, coping repairs, tile replacement, and hot tub upgrades to restore your pool to like-new condition.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of filters, pumps, heaters, heat pumps, and automatic cleaners. We keep your pool systems running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Professional liner installation to fix tears, fading, or aging vinyl. Give your pool a fresh, clean look that lasts for years.

cards.title: Deck Resurfacing
cards.description: Restore worn or damaged pool decks with expert resurfacing and staining. Improve safety and curb appeal around your entire pool area.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Thorough assessments of equipment, structure, and water chemistry — ideal for new homeowners, seasonal openings, or before buying a home with a pool.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll provide an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments.

steps.title: We Take Care of It All
steps.description: Our experienced team arrives on schedule and handles everything — cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, repairs. Three decades of expertise in every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Worry-Free
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. And if you ever need anything adjusted, one call is all it takes — we stand behind our work.

about.label: Why Charlotte Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1996 — Charlotte's Largest Pool Service
about.description: When Tom Cornelius started Clearwater Pool Service nearly 30 years ago, the goal was simple: treat every pool like it was his own. That family-first philosophy turned a one-man operation into the Charlotte region's largest pool service provider. Today, our team of 7 dedicated professionals still operates with those same values — honest pricing, reliable service, and the kind of thorough care that only comes from people who truly love what they do.

features.title: No Contracts. No Surprises.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. Flexible weekly or one-time service with no binding agreements and no cancellation fees.

features.title: Nearly 30 Years of Expertise
features.description: Since 1996, we've handled everything from routine cleanings to complete renovations. There's no pool problem we haven't solved.

features.title: On-Site Pool Supply Store
features.description: Need chemicals or equipment between visits? Our retail store stocks top brands like Aquabrite and Natural Chemistry for all your pool needs.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose weekly maintenance, one-time service, or anything in between. No contracts lock you in — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — at no extra charge. We've been building trust in the Charlotte area for 30 years, and we're not about to stop now. Your satisfaction is our reputation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. If you have an urgent situation like a green pool, call us directly and we'll do our best to get out there fast.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a contract?
faqs.answer: Absolutely not. Clearwater has never required contracts in nearly 30 years. We offer flexible service from weekly maintenance to one-time cleanings — you choose what works for you, and you can cancel anytime.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Fort Mill SC, Charlotte NC, Waxhaw NC, Matthews NC, Weddington NC, and Indian Land SC. If you're in the greater Charlotte metro area, chances are we can help.

faqs.question: Do you sell pool supplies and equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes! We have an on-site retail store stocked with top-quality pool chemicals, water testing equipment, ladders, safety supplies, and more from trusted brands like Aquabrite and Natural Chemistry.

faqs.question: Can you renovate or repair my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle everything from minor pump repairs to full renovations including re-plastering, tile replacement, deck resurfacing, and vinyl liner installations. Call us for a free assessment.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: My pool was a mess — greener than the yard! Thanks to Clearwater Pool Service they got it up and running in just 8 hours. The owner and staff were incredibly friendly and professional.

testimonials.name: Loyal Customer
testimonials.text: I've told my friends and family about Clearwater and now they all get their pools serviced weekly too. Really awesome service — consistent, reliable, and fairly priced.

testimonials.name: New Pool Owner
testimonials.text: The team was fantastic from start to finish. Staff members were prompt and helpful, offering pool care training and explaining services thoroughly so we felt confident as new pool owners.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Practically Cares for Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Charlotte's most trusted pool service. Nearly 30 years of experience, no contracts, and a team that treats your pool like their own.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
